zh.lifeSummary: 當Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor於1154年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維時，他的父親Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor26歲，母親Margaret FitzTancred29歲。他於1177年與Avice de Heireann, of Ireland在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1213年9月17日在威爾士布洛可爾卡維享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor于1154年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維时，他的父亲Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor26岁，母亲Margaret FitzTancred29岁。他于1177年与Avice de Heireann, of Ireland在英国波克夏结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1213年9月17日在威尔士布洛可爾卡維享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Odo
meanings: the Celtic name Aodh has been Anglicised into Hugh, and Latinised variously Hugo, Ædus, Ædanus, Aidus, and Odo.

nameMeanings.name: Jr.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usually a girl's name, a short form of Joanna , Joanne , Jody , or Josephine , sometimes used independently or in combination with other names, for example Nancy Jo and Jo Anne ( see Joanne ). Occasionally it is a boy's name, a variant spelling of Joe . Famous female bearers include the American female pop singer Jo Stafford ( 1920–2008 ) and the British politician Jo Grimond (originally Joseph Grimond , 1913–93 ).

variants.name: Joanna
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joseph
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Joanne
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Josephine
meanings: From French Joséphine, a feminine equivalent of Joseph formed with the diminutive suffix -ine. It is now widely used in the English-speaking world. Notable bearers have included the British social reformer Josephine Butler ( 1828–1906 ) and the American-born French dancer and singer Josephine Baker ( 1906–75 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor was born in 1154, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor, was 26 and his mother, Margaret FitzTancred, was 29. He married Avice de Heireann, of Ireland in 1177, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 September 1213, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor est né en 1154, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzTancred, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Avice de Heireann, of Ireland en 1177, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1213, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor 1154 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor 26 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzTancred 29. Er hat 1177 in Berkshire, England Avice de Heireann, of Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1213 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor è nato il nel 1154 nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzTancred, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Avice de Heireann, of Ireland nel 1177, nel Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1213, nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsorが1154年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで生まれた時，父Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsorは26歳，母Margaret FitzTancredは29歳であった。1177年にイギリスバークシュアイアでAvice de Heireann, of Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1213年9月17日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor(이)가 1154년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzTancred(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1177년 영국 버크실르에서 Avice de Heireann, of Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1213년 9월 17일 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor nasceu em 1154, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzTancred, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Avice de Heireann, of Ireland em 1177, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1213, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor родился в 1154 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzTancred, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice de Heireann, of Ireland в 1177 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1213 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor nació en 1154, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzTancred, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Avice de Heireann, of Ireland en 1177, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1213, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 59 años.
